title: Player head drops
description: Make players drop their head when dying from a player or not
body:
Two versions are available, 
  - one where the player needs to be killed by another player
  - one where the player only needs to die

Work with:  
`/gamerule keepInventory true/false`

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Vvmp7ix_4Pk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
